caption: Style: Photorealistic. A cozy traditional Chinese-style study bedroom with warm ambient lighting from a bedside lamp casting soft golden light across the space. The scene features rich dark wood bookshelves filled with neatly arranged books, a wooden desk with a teapot, tea cups, a pair of reading glasses, and a smartphone neatly placed. A comfortable bed with dark bedding sits against the wall beneath framed photographs. A wooden door is visible on one side of the room. The wooden floor reflects the warm lamp glow, creating long gentle shadows. The atmosphere is refined, scholarly, and deeply personal, evoking a sense of quiet contemplation and cultivated taste. The camera smoothly pulls backward while gradually leveling out the view to reveal the full room from a more balanced angle. Then the camera smoothly pans left to showcase the bookshelf, reading desk, and the door on the left wall. Finally the camera smoothly pans right to reveal more of the wall decorations, window area, and the overall spacious layout of the room.
